name: Rhubarb Sherbet
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the rhubarb, 1 cup water, and sugar in a saucepan. Cover and cook slowly until the rhubarb is tender.
2. Soften the gelatin in 1/4 cup water. Stir until dissolved.
3. Add the softened gelatin to the rhubarb mixture and stir until fully blended.
4. Add salt and orange marmalade, mixing until well combined.
5. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
6. Partially freeze the mixture until it reaches a semi-solid state.
7. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg white. Continue freezing until firm.
6 servings. Anna Davis, Ravenswood, W.V.
